description: All overlay/modal open, interact, and close correctly

tests.name: Glossary opens
steps: Find and click the glossary button in sidebar
Wait for glossary overlay to appear
Verify #glossaryOverlay is visible
Check that glossary terms are listed (500+ expected)

tests.name: Glossary search works
steps: With glossary open, find the search input
Type 'covenant' in glossary search
Verify results filter to show covenant-related terms
tests.pass_criteria: Glossary filters to show matching terms

tests.name: Glossary closes
steps: With glossary open, find and click close button
Verify #glossaryOverlay is hidden
tests.pass_criteria: Glossary overlay dismissed, main content visible

tests.name: Map opens
steps: Find and click the map button in sidebar
Wait for map overlay to appear
Verify #mapOverlay is visible
Check that Leaflet map renders with markers

tests.name: Map closes
steps: With map open, click close button
Verify #mapOverlay is hidden

tests.name: Hebrew opens
steps: Find and click the Hebrew button in sidebar
Wait for Hebrew overlay to appear
Verify #hebrewOverlay is visible
Check for 22 Hebrew letter cards

tests.name: Hebrew closes
steps: With Hebrew open, click close button
Verify #hebrewOverlay is hidden

tests.name: Resources opens
steps: Find and click the resources button in sidebar
Wait for resources overlay to appear
Verify #resourcesOverlay is visible
Check that resource cards are listed

tests.name: Resources filter works
steps: With resources open, find category filter buttons
Click a specific category filter
Verify resources filter to show only that category

tests.name: Matrix opens
steps: Find and click the matrix button in sidebar
Wait for matrix overlay to appear
Verify #matrixOverlay is visible
Check that religion/doctrine grid renders with 50+ entries

tests.name: Matrix religion detail
steps: With matrix open, click on a religion card
Verify #religionDetailOverlay appears
Check that detail content renders (beliefs, comparisons)
tests.pass_criteria: Religion detail overlay opens with content

tests.name: Timeline opens
steps: Find and click the timeline button in sidebar
Wait for timeline overlay to appear
Verify #timelineOverlay is visible
Check that timeline events render

tests.name: Progress opens
steps: Find and click the progress button in sidebar
Wait for progress overlay to appear
Verify #progressOverlay is visible
Check that progress stats render

tests.name: ESC closes overlay
steps: Open the glossary overlay
Press the Escape key
Verify the overlay is dismissed
tests.pass_criteria: Pressing ESC closes the active overlay
